title: Viking Therapeutics Launches Phase 3 VANQUISH Program for VK2735
text: Viking Therapeutics announced the initiation of the Phase 3 VANQUISH clinical program for VK2735, a dual GLP-1/GIP receptor agonist being developed for obesity treatment. The VANQUISH program comprises two randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trials. VANQUISH-1 will enroll approximately 4,500 obese or overweight adults with at least one weight-related condition, and VANQUISH-2 will enroll approximately 1,100 obese or overweight adults with type 2 diabetes. Both studies will evaluate weekly subcutaneous injections at three dose levels (7.5 mg, 12.5 mg, and 17.5 mg) versus placebo over 78 weeks. The trials will measure percent change in body weight from baseline for participants receiving VK2735 as compared to placebo after 78 weeks of treatment. Viking's Phase 2 VENTURE study showed strong results, with patients achieving statistically significant reductions in mean body weight from baseline, ranging up to 14.7%, and maintaining most weight loss seven weeks after treatment ended. CEO Brian Lian stated the company is excited to advance VK2735 into Phase 3 clinical development, moving one step closer to potentially bringing this important therapeutic to patients with obesity.
